sections.paragraph: στῦλος, ου, ὁ [ἵστημι w. focus on the idea of standing] ‘supporting medium’, for a structure pillar, column, of feet that had the appearance of fiery pillars Rv 10:1. In imagery, of God’s believing community as support of ἀλήθεια 1 Ti 3:15; of an especially valued member of the community Gal 2:9; Rv 3:12.
